_doc: Py<->TS Kind registry parity. ts_aliases = TS builtin Kinds implemented as CLASSES; descriptor-backed Kinds (*/kinds/*.kind.yaml, byte-identical Py<->TS package data) are DERIVED by scanning at test time and must NOT be hand-listed here. py_only_allowlist = Kinds registered in Python (entry-points) intentionally NOT yet ported to TS. Adding a Py class Kind requires porting it (add to ts_aliases + the TS extension) OR documenting it here; adding a descriptor Kind requires NO registry edit (both runtimes get it by construction). CI fails on undocumented drift. REGENERATED by scripts/dna_extract.py in the source repo — do not hand-edit.
